title: First Day of Work...
content: I liked it! Not used to the whole break situation but I'm learning :)

title: Ouchie
content: Just got back from the ER... The IV hurt :(

title: New Job!?!?
content: I'm a host now! I wasn't expecting that 0_0 but hey, whatever funds my manba dreams!

title: Love Invasion
content: I've been listening to that song by aki so much. It's stuck in my head. (　´д｀) I keep imagining meeting a punk/rokku ikeman... Maybe one day I'll have my alt king.

title: MALL TIME MALL TIME!!
content: So hype to finally have someone to go to the mall with! 💖
